title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Urban Development and Housing Board (MUDHB) Recommendation for the Approval of the Application for Alteration of the Development Plan of Heaven?s Garden Memorial Park by Ventura Development Corporation Located at Barangay Anos, Los Baños, Laguna Involving Two (2) Lots with an Aggregate Area of Ninety-nine (99) Square Meters.
